title: UltraAttacking
description: Resource pack that turns attack sounds to Ultrakill SFX
body:
Resource pack that turns attack sounds to Ultrakill SFX

Changes SFX for weapons
- Swords
- Axes
- Bows
- Crossbows
- Tridents
- Maces

Changes Attack sounds for
- Crits
- Knockback attacks
- Weak attacks
- Strong attacks
